creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update audio/mp3info port.


diff -Nru mp3info/Makefile mp3info-0.2.16/Makefile
--- mp3info/Makefile	Wed Apr  7 14:28:32 1999
+++ mp3info-0.2.16/Makefile	Tue Jun 22 07:38:29 1999
@@ -8,7 +8,9 @@
 
 DISTNAME=		mp3info-0.2.16
 CATEGORIES=		audio
-MASTER_SITES=		ftp://bimbo.hive.no/pub/mp3info/
+MASTER_SITES=		ftp://bimbo.hive.no/pub/mp3info/ \
+			${MASTER_SITE_SUNSITE}
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	apps/audio/editors
 
 MAINTAINER=		andy@icc.surw.chel.su

Fix: 

Please, check and commit this patch.
